name: Calin Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Calin Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells high-precision optical lens and components. Its products include automotive camera, security camera, projector lens, digital camera lens, DSLR, industrial lenses, and medical endoscopy lens. The company also offers aspherical glass molding lens, glass grinding, and injection-optical lenses. In addition, it provides customized development and assembly services. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.
